parts.name: Part 1
parts.instructions: You must answer this question. Write 140-190 words in an appropriate style.

tasks.lead: In your English class you have been talking about tourism. Now your English teacher has asked you to write an essay. Write an essay using all the notes and giving reasons for your point of view.

stimulus.body:
"Attracting more tourists would be good for your region. Do you agree?"

Notes

Write about:
1. jobs
2. the environment
3. ............... (your own idea)

bullets: give reasons for your point of view

parts.name: Part 2
parts.instructions: Answer one of these questions. Write 140-190 words in an appropriate style.

tasks.lead: You see this announcement in an international English-language travel magazine.

stimulus.title: THE PLACE THE GUIDEBOOKS MISS
stimulus.body: Every region has a special place that tourists walk straight past. Write an article about a place in your region that deserves more visitors, describing what makes it special, and explaining why the guidebooks ignore it. The best articles will be published.

bullets: a place in your region that deserves more visitors

tasks.lead: You have received this email from your English-speaking friend Toni.

stimulus.body:
From: Toni
Subject: Planning my trip!

I'm finally coming to visit your region — I just need to choose the dates. When is the best time of year to come? I'd love to see the famous sights, but I'd also like to do something most tourists don't do. Oh, and what should I pack? I always bring the wrong clothes!
Can't wait,
Toni

bullets: the best time of year to visit

tasks.lead: You see this announcement on an English-language travel website.

stimulus.title: Attraction reviews from locals
stimulus.body: Tourists read reviews written by other tourists — but locals know the truth! Write a review of a well-known attraction in your region, describing what visitors can see and do there, mentioning anything that is overrated, and giving one tip only a local would know.

bullets: what visitors can see and do
a tip only a local would know
